Home / Services / Wheel Alignment

Wheel Alignment

Precision alignments to combat Louisville's pothole season.

Kentucky's freeze-thaw cycles create alignment-challenging road conditions each winter. Our Hunter alignment system precisely measures camber, caster, and toe angles to manufacturer specifications.

We pay special attention to vehicles frequently crossing the Big Four Bridge or navigating downtown's brick streets. The process includes a pre-alignment inspection of suspension components - we'll notify you of any worn parts affecting alignment accuracy. Proper alignment improves tire life by 20-30% on Louisville's roads.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Test drive to identify handling characteristics
  2. 02 Step 2: Suspension component inspection
  3. 03 Step 3: Four-wheel alignment measurement
  4. 04 Step 4: Adjustment and verification

Benefits

  • Reduces uneven tire wear
  • Improves fuel efficiency
  • Enhances vehicle handling
  • Prevents premature suspension wear

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should Louisville drivers get alignments?

Annually, or immediately after hitting a major pothole. Spring is ideal after winter road damage.

Can alignment fix my car pulling to one side?

Usually yes, but we first check for other causes like brake drag or tire pressure differences.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with wheel alignment? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-tir-r91
